description:
Configure the 'Sales Invoice' email template in Manager.io. The template must use the Subject 'Invoice {{Reference}} from Northwind Traders' and the following Body:

Dear Customer,

Please find attached your invoice dated {{IssueDate}}.

Thank you for your business.

Ensure the {{Reference}} and {{IssueDate}} placeholders are preserved exactly as shown.

expected_body_snippets: Please find attached your invoice dated {{IssueDate}}.
